case_title: E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC et al VS. MICHAEL L. PATNODE et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC ANDERSON, JERRY P. AS TO RESPONDENT PATNODE, MICHAEL L. DOES 1 THRU 100, INCL. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF DEFT'S FAILURE TO OPPOSE PLTFS' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC ANDERSON, JERRY P.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-19-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION, SUMMONS, P&A IN SUPPORT OF PETITION, DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF PETITION; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET, PROPOSED ORDER FILED BY PETITIONER E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC ANDERSON, JERRY P. SERVED MAY-31-2011, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE JUN-06-2011 AS TO DEFENDANT PATNODE, MICHAEL L.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER FILED BY PETITIONER E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC ANDERSON, JERRY P.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONERS E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC. AND JERRY ANDERSON'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO JUL-19-2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 FOR PETITIONERS TO PROVIDE DEPARTMENT 301 WITH COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR MOVING PAPERS, PER SF LOCAL RULE 2.6(B) NO LATER THAN 7/14/11. COURTESY COPIES TO REFLECT THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-11-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONERS E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC AND JERRY ANDERSON'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE PETITIONER PROVIDED AT THE HEARING A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE INDICATIVE OF STATUTORILY SUFFICIENT NOTICE AND SERVICE AS TO THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189

POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC ANDERSON, JERRY P. HEARING SET FOR JUL-11-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF E*TRADE SECURITIES LLC ANDERSON, JERRY P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATNODE, MICHAEL L. (CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD) SEE SCANNED DOC
